add.description: Ensure POST /api/v1/cart/items, GET /api/v1/cart, PUT /api/v1/cart/items/{itemId}, DELETE /api/v1/cart/items/{itemId} endpoints are present and match contract (including default quantity behavior).
add.reason: These endpoints are explicitly required in the story summary and must be reflected in the LLD with correct contract details.

add.description: Cart View Interface, Empty Cart View with Redirection Link, Add to Cart Interaction Handler, and Quantity Updater Component must be described in LLD.
add.reason: Story summary mandates these UI components for cart management; LLD must specify their responsibilities and integration.

add.description: Automatic recalculation of subtotal and total upon any quantity mutation, and empty cart state triggers UI redirection ('continue shopping' link).
add.reason: These business rules are required for functional correctness and user experience, as specified in the story summary.

add.description: ShoppingCart entity (bound to user session or ID) and CartItem entity (with Product Reference, Quantity, Price Snapshot) must be defined.
add.reason: Story summary requires these data models for cart persistence and item management.

add.description: Quantity validation (min: 1, max: stock level), product existence, and cart ownership checks.
add.reason: Validation rules are necessary for data integrity and security, as implied by story requirements.
